creator: mi+mx@aldan.algebra.com
text:
The pop3 times out trying to connect to a port, where nothing is listening 
(deliberately). It expects to get a prompt "Connection refused" message, but 
times out isntead -- likely, because your kernel drops such connections 
attempts instead of NACK-ing them.

Why the math-test is failing is a mistery -- "expr" appears to return an empty 
string instead of a number. Can you try running the test manually, perhaps?

Thanks!

	-mi
